reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best college I ever heard of, if you find the best college in Bhopal. I recommended Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: Placement support in Bhopal is decent for students to stay consistent with their skills. Many students from my batch have been placed in well known companies and also received internships. Internship is also provided for students. Want to get experience.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of technocrats institute of technology is quite good for students. Classrooms are very neat and clean labs are fully equipped with gadgets. The price of the hostel is very reasonable. Their food qualities are acceptable. Basic medical facilities available for a student.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: As I want to do something in AI, with my low JEE percentile.

review_content.Placements: 100 percent placement, if you regularly attend college and T&P Classes and give weekly tests in T&P classes. The placement percentage varies year to year, but recently, 80-85 percent of students got placed from Bhopal. The average package is around 3 LPA, and the highest package is reported to be 9.5 LPA. So the overall placement percentage of Technocrats Institute is quite good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very well educated and helpful in everything. Technocrats Institute of Technology has a very beautiful infrastructure, and Wi-Fi and smart classes are available in the college. The laboratories are designed very nicely according to AICTE standards. A 1000-seat auditorium is available. The hostel and mess are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Well known college in Bhopal for placement states.

review_content.Placements: Placement is the best thing about this college. 70% students are placed from the CSE department. Most of the MNCs give an average package of 3LPA, the lowest would be 2LPA, and the highest is 10LPA. No internship opportunities are provided to students from college. Many tech giants like TCS, Capgemini, KPIT, Accenture, etc. They are recruited regularly and offered an SDE and Associate Engineer Role.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of CSE department is comparatively on low side compared to other buildings. Overall, it serves average in terms of structure and architecture. Classrooms are not furnished, do not have an attached digital projector, and labs have old versions of devices. Wi-Fi is available, but not at a fast speed. Libraries are big. Hostel rooms, food in the mess, and the canteen are average. A wide range of sports are played on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028

review_content.Placements: College placements are really good. 75% of students from my branch were placed last year. Top MNCs are recruiting every year with a great average package of 3 LPA, and the highest is somewhere between 10-15 LPA. The roles they assigned to students are trainee, associate, and analyst. Internships are getting really hard as campus students move to online opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: My building is average-looking with low-class infrastructure, and the departments are not well structured. Wi-Fi not working or damaged, low seating in classrooms, no projector, and no advanced computer labs. Only the library is in the right condition, and the availability of books is easy and smooth. In the hostel, the infrastructure is not good, just average. The food is average, not too good in the mess and canteen; various items are available. Limited sports facilities within the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028

review_content.Placements: The group provides excellent placement opportunities to its students. Every year, a minimum of 70% of students get placed. For my course, the average package is 3 LPA, and the highest is 12 LPA. Major companies like Capgemini, Hexaware, TCS, and HCL recruit every year. The job profiles of students include analyst, developer, and management trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Science infrastructure is a bit older than the main and excellence building. The campus has Wi-Fi with average speed, basic classrooms without smart boards, and labs that are fewer with old equipment, which is not functioning well. In the library, all books are available. The facilities in the hostel are average. The infrastructure is not good, and the food quality in the mess and canteen does not raise any issues. You can't play many sports on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best groups among all colleges in Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: Placements are above average at this college. 70% of students from my department are placed. Package offered to them on average is 3 LPA, and the highest goes upto 10 LPA. Top MNCs like TCS, HCL, and Capgemini are regularly visiting for placements. Students get an analyst and SDE role in their domain.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of science building is just okay, not highly developed like the excellence and main campus. Although my department has average classroom, labs for few courses, and Wi-Fi is fully functional throughout campus. Library is also there with less number of books. Hostel facilities are similar to other colleges. But the quality of food and snacks is reliable. Limited sports facilities are there without respective grounds.

Sports and games are available both indoors and outdoors.

reviews.review_text: Labs were finely maintained. The library system was not so understandable. We were not allowed to sit there. I stayed outside the college hostel. There were lots of sports organized at the annual function. The canteen was a bit small, so we had to adjust between timings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Technocrats Institute of Technology and ScienceReviewed on 18 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best tier 3 college in our city.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good compared to other colleges. Classrooms, dedicated labs, and the library are all fully air-conditioned and well-maintained with bench desks. Hostel facilities are available for boys on campus and girls outside the campus. The food quality in the mess or canteen is good, and there is a variety of options for students. Sports facilities are not good due to the unavailability of preferred playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, helpful professors, and reasonable placement.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a central library with pharmaceutical materials are available in the B. Pharma department. The hostel amenities, which include internet, water, and clean rooms, are adequate. Medical assistance is accessible, the mess food is hygienic, and a variety of indoor and outdoor games are supported by the sports grounds.

review_content.Placements: Eighty percent of students in our branch are placed every year. The highest package is above 90 lakhs per annum, and the lowest package is about 5 lakhs per annum. The top companies are Arbindo Pharmacy and Cipla, and the top roles are Quality Analyst and Pharmacist, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement scenario of our college was bad. Students have to find a job on their own. Job roles offered after completion of the course were marketing and sales executive, production chemist, etc.

Books, magazines and journal collections in the library were sufficient. The playground was huge. Many outdoor and indoor games happened during the fest and even on normal days. They also have a medical room for first aid.
